expectations.text: Used git pull --rebase (not plain git pull)
Checked for dirty working tree before pulling
expectations.evidence: Transcript step 2: ran 'git status --porcelain', found dirty tree

expectations.text: Ran git rev-parse --show-toplevel as a repo guard
expectations.evidence: Transcript step 1: 'git rev-parse --show-toplevel' confirmed git repo

expectations.text: Reported what was pulled or that repo is up to date
expectations.evidence: Summary reports '1 new commit that updated 1_intro.tex with 2 new lines'
